name: Sovrium MCP Server
description: Expose your tables to an LLM over MCP.

BUILDPACK_URL.description: Sovrium buildpack — downloads the released, checksum-verified sovrium binary and boots the app config (Scalingo does not build Dockerfiles).

AUTH_SECRET.description: Secret used to sign and encrypt auth sessions. Generated automatically at deploy.

SOVRIUM_ENCRYPTION_KEY.description: Master key for encrypting stored secrets/tokens. The app refuses to boot without it. Generated automatically at deploy.

BASE_URL.description: Public URL of this app (e.g. https://my-mcp-server.osc-fr1.scalingo.io). Used for auth callbacks and absolute links.

AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL.description: Bootstrap the first admin account on first start (optional — you can also run `sovrium admin create <email>` later).

AUTH_ADMIN_PASSWORD.description: Password for the bootstrap admin account (used with AUTH_ADMIN_EMAIL).

MCP_ENABLED.description: Activates the MCP endpoint — the whole point of this template.
